# Changelog

## 2.1.2
- Fixed a crash when MCP tools return image content
- Fixed /resume session previews showing raw XML tags

## 2.1.1
- Added guard against launching Claude Code inside another session
- Improved model error messages for Bedrock users
- Fixed Agent Teams using wrong model identifier

## 2.0.1
- Added new feature for streaming
- Improved startup performance

## 1.0.1
- Fixed critical bug in authentication
- Fixed login flow error

- Fixed contrast issue in sidebar
